summary: Comprehensive testing of College ERP System enhanced features. Backend tests: 28/28 passed (100%). All new API endpoints working correctly including Settings, Profile, Password Change, Grievance Workflow, Document Workflow, Fee Analytics, and Risk Analytics. Frontend dashboards functional for all 5 roles with proper navigation and data display.

ui_bugs.issue: SettingsPage component from /app/frontend/src/components/ui/SettingsPage.jsx is NOT integrated in dashboard routes. Principal, Admin, HOD, Faculty dashboards have local placeholder SettingsPage functions showing 'System settings and configuration will appear here' instead of the actual settings component with theme, notifications, and password change functionality.
Student dashboard sidebar does not have Settings option at all

backend_api: Authentication for all 5 roles (admin, hod, faculty, principal, student)
PUT /api/settings - Updates theme, notifications, language preferences
GET /api/profile - Returns user profile with role-specific details
POST /api/change-password - Correctly validates and changes password
POST /api/grievances - Student submits grievance with ticket_id and workflow_history
PUT /api/grievances/{id}/resolve - Resolves grievance with resolution text
GET /api/grievances/{id} - Returns grievance with full workflow history
POST /api/documents/request - Creates document request with request_number
GET /api/analytics/fees - Returns fee analytics with department breakdown and monthly trends
GET /api/analytics/risks - Returns at-risk students with risk_score and risk_level
GET /api/audit-logs - Returns enhanced audit logs with user_name and user_role
frontend_ui: Landing page with 5 role cards loads correctly
Principal Dashboard - Shows Total Students, Faculty, Departments, Fee Collected, Department-wise chart, CGPA Distribution, Recent Audit Activity
Admin Dashboard - Shows stats, Quick Actions (Add Student, Add Faculty, Bulk Upload, Fee Config), Document Requests, Grievances sections
HOD Dashboard - Shows Department Students, Faculty Members, Subjects, Pending Approvals, At-Risk Students, Subject-Faculty Mapping with Add Mapping button
Faculty Dashboard - Shows professor info, Class Incharge badge, Assigned Subjects, My Students, Quick Actions, Attendance and Marks Entry pages
Student Dashboard - Shows CGPA (8.50), Attendance (100%), Current Semester, Quick Actions, Announcements
Student Grievances Page - Shows submission form with category dropdown and My Grievances list with resolved/open status
Student Documents Page - Shows document type selection and Request Status list with workflow status badges (principal_signed, office_verified, submitted)

action_items: MEDIUM: Integrate SettingsPage.jsx component into all dashboard routes instead of placeholder functions. Update PrincipalDashboard.js, AdminDashboard.js, HODDashboard.js, FacultyDashboard.js to import and use the real SettingsPage component
LOW: Add Settings navigation to Student dashboard sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Settings Page Integration Missing: The SettingsPage component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/ui/SettingsPage.jsx with proper theme, notification, and password change UI but is not imported/used in any dashboard. Each dashboard file has a local placeholder SettingsPage function.
Code Quality: Backend API implementation is solid with proper audit logging, workflow tracking, and error handling

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all dashboards functional, only Settings integration issue)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during grievance and document workflow tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and passing. Frontend dashboards functional for all roles. Main issue is SettingsPage component not integrated - needs import and route update in dashboard files. Grievance workflow (Student→Faculty→HOD→Admin→Principal) and Document workflow (Student→Admin→HOD→Principal) fully tested via API and visible in UI.
